arts.ttl: “Pushing for start” | Early Team News | Liverpool vs West Ham
arts.sum: Niclas Fullkrug is pushing for a start when we face Liverpool at Anfield later today. Although his fitness is to be understandably assessed closely, having recently come back from a serious hamstring injury, many will hope Potter opts to play the German from the off.
